The '''''Pride of the Senate''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] during his third tour of duty in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was one of three ''Dreadnaught''-class cruisers present at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. The ''Pride of the Senate'' took fairly minimal damage in the battle. When a retreat was ordered, Captain Fel withdrew very slowly so that he could recover all the remaining [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1stp}} {{Flash}}
